changeSet.author: gavynholt
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO "user" (id, created_at, username, first_name, last_name, email, company_code, location) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), '2026-03-01T09:00:00Z'::timestamptz, 'jsmith', 'John', 'Smith', 'john.smith@example.com', 'RSPNDR', ARRAY[43.6532, -79.3832]::double precision[]), (gen_random_uuid(), '2026-03-01T09:15:00Z'::timestamptz, 'adoe', 'Alice', 'Doe', 'alice.doe@example.com', 'RSPNDR', ARRAY[43.7615, -79.4111]::double precision[]), (gen_random_uuid(), '2026-03-01T09:30:00Z'::timestamptz, 'bjohnson', 'Brian', 'Johnson', 'brian.johnson@example.com', 'ALPHA', ARRAY[43.5890, -79.6441]::double precision[]), (gen_random_uuid(), '2026-03-01T09:45:00Z'::timestamptz, 'cwilson', 'Chloe', 'Wilson', 'chloe.wilson@example.com', 'ALPHA', ARRAY[43.7731, -79.2578]::double precision[]), (gen_random_uuid(), '2026-03-01T10:00:00Z'::timestamptz, 'dlee', 'Daniel', 'Lee', 'daniel.lee@example.com', 'BRAVO', ARRAY[43.6205, -79.5132]::double precision[]), (gen_random_uuid(),
